title: MUSIC VIDEO RENDER C — 8-character group-tag celebration (Everyone's IT)

preRenderRequired.command: python3 content/generateGroupShot.py everyones_it_group_still --chars sara,eva,papa,isabel,leo --extras 3 --pose 'group-tag freeze-frame on green tennis court, 8 figures arranged in cheerful semicircle: papa CENTER on hands and knees as silly tag-monster grin big, sara LEFT of papa hands raised cheering helmet on, eva RIGHT of papa hands clapping helmet on, isabel KNEELING-LEFT-FOREGROUND touching ground (it!), leo STANDING-RIGHT-FOREGROUND both hands raised, 3 unnamed friend-kids in midground at various happy poses (one on left waving, one center between sara and eva clapping, one on right giggling), all on green court with white lines, all smiling, soft warm afternoon light, no other people' --scene tennis-court --n 3

preRenderNote: Same Nano Banana group-shot as clip 17 (re-uses the same locked composition for visual consistency). The 8-char count is hard-locked by the still — Kling animates from it, doesn't introduce new characters.
reuseAssetNote: ONE 10s render of the 8-character group-tag scene animating gently from the Nano Banana still, paired with Suno song 'Everyones IT.mp3' via loopVideoWithSong.mjs (looped 6× to fill 60s).
prompt: Wide cinematic kid-show friendship-celebration shot at @tennis-court — green court with white lines, soft warm afternoon light. The composition is anchored by the @everyones-it-still pre-rendered group shot (5 characters in a cheerful semicircle, all locked in place). Kling gently animates the still — characters smile widely, sway softly in unison, raise hands in cheer, NO walking, NO running, NO position changes. POSITION LOCK — every character stays in their EXACT same spot from the source still throughout the entire 10s. Only soft sway + smile + cheer-wave changes. Exactly FIVE people in the entire frame, matching the still: Isabel (kneeling LEFT-FOREGROUND on green court, brunette curls), Sara (CENTER-LEFT standing with pink helmet, both hands raised cheering), Papa (CENTER on hands-and-knees as silly tag-monster, big warm dad-grin), Eva (CENTER-RIGHT standing with teal helmet, both hands clapping), Leo (RIGHT-FOREGROUND standing next to Eva, both arms raised, tiny dinosaur in left hand). NO additional kids appear, NO extras spawn. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) The whole group sways gently in unison from their exact frozen poses, smiles widening warmly. (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) The whole group raises one hand together in a soft cheerful unison wave at the camera, smiles peaking. Pure friendship-celebration warmth. Soft cheerful kid-laughter ambiance. Designed to LOOP cleanly: every character returns to identical starting pose at second 0 and second 10. No audible speech, no music — silent render. STRICT ANATOMY: each character has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Each character stays in their EXACT same physical spot from the still — no walking, no running, no leaping, no climbing on each other. Papa stays on hands-and-knees in his tag-monster pose throughout, never leaves the ground, never lunges. The tennis court stays plain clean.
